DESCRIPTION/ALTERED EFFECT: s
e |
A traffic light with three distinct lights \ v »
arranged vertically on each of its four L D
sides. From top to bottom, the lights b
shine red, yellow, and green.
A popular children’s game (see CBA-316 for details) is believed to
be integral in the manifestation of this item and its effect. If an
entity approaches the item while its red light is activated, they will
be instantaneously relocated a distance af_from the
item.
NOTE: Theories that the item is shifting people to a former timeline
or parallel universe have been explored and dismissed.
BACKGROUND:
The item was discovered after a street light at an intersection near
the elementary school began shifting people away from itself after
sunset. A local panic brought the case to the attention of the
Bureau. The item was contained and a gas leak was blamed for
this confusion in the townspeople's perception.
